title: Multifamily Dwellings: A garden apartment complex is typically classified as a high-rise...
summary: Classify garden apartment complexes as low-rise multifamily properties.
prompt: A garden apartment complex is typically classified as a high-rise multifamily property.
solution: Garden apartment complexes are classified as low-rise properties, which generally consist of buildings with fewer than four floors. This distinction is important for understanding market segmentation and property valuations.
